home.meta_title: Fuel Economy Calculator - Save on Petrol | FuelEcon UK
home.meta_description: Calculate fuel costs in pounds, compare vehicle efficiency, and find fuel-saving tips for UK drivers.
home.ev_notice_html: ⚡ Electric vehicle? Compare EV vs Petrol savings

tips: 🌿 Below 50 mph, open windows instead of A/C — A/C can cost 3-4 MPG.
🛣️ Steady 55-65 mph on the motorway is the MPG sweet spot for most cars.
📦 Roof racks tank fuel economy — take them off when you're not using them.
⛽ Cruise control on flat motorway = 7-14% MPG improvement.
🔧 A clogged air filter can cost you 10% MPG. Change it when dirty.
🚗 Combine errands — cold starts use 2x more fuel per mile than warm driving.
🕐 Idling over 30 seconds burns more fuel than restarting the engine.
🏔️ Drive down hills in gear, not neutral — modern cars cut fuel when engine-braking.

ecoAdvice.highwaySaving: 🛣️ Take the motorway if you can — you'd save about £${savings} on this exact trip.
ecoAdvice.highwayOk: ✅ Motorway route — already the cheapest option for fuel.
ecoAdvice.tiresLow: ⚠️ Your tyres are low. Inflating them is free and gives you back about 8% MPG.
ecoAdvice.acceleration: 📉 Smooth acceleration = 10-30% less fuel over a tank.

mpgConverter.note_units: UK gallon (Imperial) differs from US gallon.

evVsGas.title: EV vs Gas Break-Even Calculator
evVsGas.description: Find out when an electric vehicle pays for itself compared to a gas car.
evVsGas.heading: Is an EV Worth It?
evVsGas.result_never: EV never pays back under these assumptions
evVsGas.result_explanation: At the break-even point, fuel savings equal the EV's higher upfront cost.
